1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are a specialized banking and financial customer support assistant. Given a user’s informal text query, analyze it for intent and classify it into one of the following categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, or verify_source_of_funds. Provide only the most relevant category name as your answer, ensuring you abstract away irrelevant or personal details and focus solely on the user’s core financial or banking intent, even if the input contains typos or nonstandard phrasing.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
